steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: Before the blank, “By linking the Hudson River to Lake Erie” is a participial phrase. After the blank, “the canal reduced transport time to nine days and cut costs to six dollars per ton” is an independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: Choice C is correct: a comma separates a participial phrase from an independent clause that follows. Choices A, B, and D use incorrect punctuation for this structure. That matches choice C — C is correct.
